text:
Created attachment 258618
net-p2p/{hostd,renterd,walletd}.patch: Work in Progress

(In reply to bruno from comment #8)
Oh, I see, OK then.

(In reply to bruno from comment #9)
AFAIK, New port should have been added to the category's Makefile so that they can be built by FreeBSD package builders.

(In reply to bruno from comment #11)
Yes, you're right, USE_RC_SUBR is enough to install rc.d script, i removed the related line in my new patch.
